flight_name.description: Name of the AWACS flight in spec.flights
flight_name.title: Flight Name

ActionKind.description: Trigger action types supported in v1.
ActionKind.title: ActionKind

AlarmState.description: Alarm state for ground/air defense units.
AlarmState.title: AlarmState

images_blue.description: Blueprint image file paths for blue
images_blue.title: Images Blue

images_red.description: Blueprint image file paths for red
images_red.title: Images Red

Bullseye.description:
Bullseye (navigation reference point) for each coalition.

If absent from a MissionSpec, the assembler falls back to the
theatre default from catalog/theatres.py.
Bullseye.title: Bullseye

CarrierOps.description:
Carrier operations configuration.

TACAN, ICLS, BRC, and link-4 settings for a carrier.
The ship must exist in spec.ships with a carrier-type vessel.

ship_name.description: Name of the carrier ship in spec.ships
ship_name.title: Ship Name

link4_mhz.description: Link-4 data link frequency in MHz
link4_mhz.title: Link4 Mhz

CarrierOps.title: CarrierOps

Coalition.description: A coalition side with its countries.
Coalition.title: Coalition

CustomScript.description: Custom Lua script to embed in the mission.
CustomScript.title: CustomScript

FARP.description: A forward arming and refuelling point.
FARP.title: FARP

group_size.description: Number of aircraft in the flight (1-4)
group_size.title: Group Size

start_type.description: Start type: cold, warm, or runway

position.description: Position for inflight spawn (if no airport)

JTACComms.description: JTAC (ground-based forward air controller) radio configuration.

unit_name.description: Name of the JTAC ground unit in spec.vehicles
unit_name.title: Unit Name

JTACComms.title: JTACComms

MapMarker.description: A text marker on the map (F10 map marker).
MapMarker.title: MapMarker

MissionGoal.description:
A mission goal / victory condition.

These map to DCS's scoring system. Cross-references to specific
flights or zones are not validated here — that belongs in validation/.

coalition.description: Which coalition this goal applies to: 'blue' or 'red'
coalition.title: Coalition

MissionGoal.title: MissionGoal

PayloadSpec.description:
Weapons and fuel configuration for a flight.

Named presets (from catalog/payloads.py) may be referenced by name.
Explicit pylons override the preset. If neither is set, the aircraft
spawns with its DCS-default loadout.

preset_name.description: Named preset from catalog/payloads.py; if set, pylons may be omitted
preset_name.title: Preset Name

PayloadSpec.title: PayloadSpec

Position.description:
Map coordinate position in meters (DCS coordinate system).

pydcs uses Point(x, y) where x is north-south, y is east-west.
Coordinates are negative on most theatres (Caucasus, Syria, etc.).
Position.title: Position

Pylon.description: A single pylon station with a weapon loadout.

quantity.description: Number of weapons on this station
quantity.title: Quantity

Pylon.title: Pylon

ROE.description: Rules of Engagement for AI groups.
ROE.title: ROE

RadioComms.description: Aggregate radio communication settings for the mission.
RadioComms.title: RadioComms

group_size.description: Number of ships of this type
group_size.title: Group Size

StaticObject.description:
A static object (building, container, etc.).

`type` is resolved against pydcs's dcs.statics.{Fortification,
GroundObject, Warehouse, Cargo} containers — see catalog/statics.py.
StaticObject.title: StaticObject

flight_name.description: Name of the tanker flight in spec.flights
flight_name.title: Flight Name

Trigger.description: A mission trigger: list of conditions AND-ed together, list of actions.

actions.description: Actions to execute when conditions fire
actions.title: Actions

Trigger.title: Trigger

TriggerAction.description:
A single trigger action.

One of the optional fields is populated based on `kind`.
TriggerAction.title: TriggerAction

TriggerCondition.description:
A single trigger condition.

One of the optional fields is populated based on `kind`.
The `params` dict allows future extensibility for condition types
not yet added to TriggerKind.
TriggerCondition.title: TriggerCondition

TriggerKind.description: Trigger condition types supported in v1.
TriggerKind.title: TriggerKind

group_size.description: Number of vehicles in the group
group_size.title: Group Size

roe.description: Rules of engagement for this group

Waypoint.description:
A waypoint along a group's route.

Speed is km/h (pydcs convention). The assembler converts to m/s
internally via dcs_agentic.units.kmh_to_ms.

speed.description: Speed in km/h (pydcs convention; converted to m/s internally)
speed.title: Speed

tasks.description: Tasks to execute at this waypoint
tasks.title: Tasks

Waypoint.title: Waypoint

season.description: Season: 'Summer', 'Winter', 'Autumn', 'Spring' (currently a no-op in the assembler)
season.title: Season

Zone.description: A circular zone on the map (combat zone, no-fly zone, etc.).
Zone.title: Zone

coalitions.description: Which countries are on which side
coalitions.title: Coalitions

zones.description: Map zones (combat zones, no-fly zones, etc.)
zones.title: Zones

agent_notes.description: Notes from the AI agent about design decisions
agent_notes.title: Agent Notes
